mapper.select: SELECT STORE_ID as storeId, STORE_NAME as storeName, STORE_ADDR as storeAddr, STORE_ADDR2 as storeAddr2, STORE_PHONE as storePhone, CATEGORY as category, STORE_CONTENT as storeContent, OPERATION_HOURS as operationHours, CREATE_DATE as createDate, RATING as rating, DIBS_COUNT as dibsCount, REVIEW_COUNT as reviewCount, STATUS as status, BIZ_NO as bizNo, OWNER_EMAIL as ownerEmail, DEPOSIT as deposit, USER_ID as userId, STORE_PICTURE as storePicture, LIKES_COUNT as likesCount FROM STORE ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE

SELECT STORE_ID as storeId, STORE_NAME as storeName, STORE_ADDR as storeAddr, STORE_ADDR2 as storeAddr2, STORE_PHONE as storePhone, CATEGORY as category, STORE_CONTENT as storeContent, OPERATION_HOURS as operationHours, CREATE_DATE as createDate, RATING as rating, DIBS_COUNT as dibsCount, REVIEW_COUNT as reviewCount, STATUS as status, BIZ_NO as bizNo, OWNER_EMAIL as ownerEmail, DEPOSIT as deposit, USER_ID as userId, STORE_PICTURE as storePicture, LIKES_COUNT as likesCount FROM STORE WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId}
SELECT menu_name FROM ( SELECT menu_name FROM menu WHERE store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY menu_id ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT STORE_ID as storeId, STORE_NAME as storeName, STORE_ADDR as storeAddr, STORE_ADDR2 as storeAddr2, STORE_PHONE as storePhone, CATEGORY as category, STORE_CONTENT as storeContent, OPERATION_HOURS as operationHours, CREATE_DATE as createDate, RATING as rating, DIBS_COUNT as dibsCount, REVIEW_COUNT as reviewCount, STATUS as status, BIZ_NO as bizNo, OWNER_EMAIL as ownerEmail, DEPOSIT as deposit, USER_ID as userId, STORE_PICTURE as storePicture, LIKES_COUNT as likesCount FROM STORE ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
